data.body:
### Summary

* Added a new active task note for **SKO-184** that captures source links, scope (bot integration, bug fixes, polish), phased implementation slices, acceptance checklist, and open technical questions so execution can happen in smaller PRs.
* Added **SKO-184** to the **Active** list in the task index for visibility/tracking alongside existing work items.
* Committed the changes with conventional commit message: `docs: add sko-184 epic task breakdown and checklist` (`06e0f34`).

**Testing**

* ✅ `git diff --check`
* ✅ `git status --short` (verified only intended task docs were changed before commit)
* ✅ `git show --stat --oneline HEAD` (verified committed file set and diff summary)

[View task →](<https://chatgpt.com/s/cd_69e48a0bdd9c8191acaeec6f5e6cd493>)

issue.title: Review AI Bot Player integration and game polish issues (converted to project)
